title: 50kW Solar Microgrid - Phase 1 Pilot
description: Deploy 50kW solar microgrid with co-ownership model for Urgam Valley pilot project. Includes 30kW guaranteed services (grid feed-in, agriculture), 15kW edge computing, and 5kW speculative computing.

localization.hiSummary: 50 kW सौर माइक्रोग्रिड – 120 घरों और सामुदायिक उपयोग के लिए
localization.guSummary: 50 kW સોલાર માઇક્રોગ્રિડ – 120 ઘરો અને સમુદાય માટે
